title: sceletium concavum
intro: Sceletium concavum, also known as Sukum bush or Kanna, is a succulent plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Aizoaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal and psychoactive properties, containing compounds such as mesembrine, which is believed to have anxiolytic and mood-enhancing effects. The health benefits of Sceletium concavum include its potential to alleviate stress, anxiety, and depression, as well as promoting a sense of calm and well-being. In traditional herbal preparations, Sceletium concavum is often dried and used as a tea, or combined with other herbs to create tonics and remedies.
